The Notebook (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $81,582,653Details
International Box Office $34,640,649
Worldwide Box Office $116,223,302
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,464,745 (16.5% of total gross)
Legs:6.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:70.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,303 opening theaters/2,323 max. theaters, 8.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $156,104,312

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 25th, 2004 (Wide) by New Line
February 12th, 2021 (Special Engagement) by New Line
International Releases: October 7th, 2004 (Limited) (New Zealand)
October 14th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
November 26th, 2004 (Wide) (South Korea)
November 13th, 2020 (Wide) (South Korea)
September 21st, 2023 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: February 8th, 2005 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexuality.
Running Time: 124 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animated Sequences, Relatives Playing Relatives, Unnamed Character, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Bigotry, Child Abuse, Coming of Age, Cross-Class Romance, Dysfunctional Family, Jewish, Pedophilia, Romance, Sex Crimes, Twins, War Crimes, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Holocaust, World War II
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Gran Via
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
